description_ja: 3人のAI賢者（ソクラテス・孔子・ブッダ）が議論し、あなたの悩みに対して多角的な視点から回答を導き出すアプリです。
description_en: Three AI sages (Socrates, Confucius, Buddha) deliberate on your questions, providing multi-perspective answers through thoughtful discussion.
keywords_ja: AI,相談,議論,哲学,知恵,賢者,ソクラテス,孔子,ブッダ,悩み,意思決定,多角的,審議,思考,対話,アドバイス,人生相談,問題解決,視点
review_notes: This app uses OpenAI API to simulate philosophical discussions between three AI sages (Socrates, Confucius, Buddha). AI Data Sharing: On first use, users are shown an explicit consent dialog explaining that their consultation text will be sent to OpenAI, Inc. (USA) for AI processing. Users must tap 'Agree' to use the AI deliberation feature. Without consent, AI features are disabled but the app remains functional. Users can withdraw consent anytime via Settings > 'AI Data Sharing Consent' toggle. No personal information (name, email, etc.) is sent to OpenAI. Data is deleted after 30 days and is not used for model training. Full details are in the in-app Privacy Policy (Section 3).
subtitle_ja: 3人のAI賢者があなたの悩みを審議
